name: |-Mulan-| (MODERN) (Mulan)
description:
“Maybe what I really wanted was to prove I could do things right, so when I looked in the mirror, I’d see someone worthwhile.”

I had no idea whether I wanted to make her more modern, or make her based on the time period in which her original movie took place. I legit got stuck quite a bit.

So I decided to try making Mulan here modern, but keep her personality from the first film. We don’t talk about the live action or sequel. We just don’t.

And if this gets popular enough, I’ll make one based on the actual movie.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
